body_transformation: The curled spiral tail tip now bears thick, corded muscle texture with cracked earth scar patterns, its flame replaced by a dense, knuckle-like protrusion of hardened charcoal gray skin. Wing membranes extend from shoulders with angular, corded muscle definition, their edges lined with deep rust calloused ridges. The rounded head retains its shape but gains a pronounced brow ridge and angular jawline, while the orange body coloration shifts to burnt sienna with ochre muscle highlights. Short stubby legs now feature broad, flat palms with calloused ridges and dense, bristly fur along the limbs.
signature_feature: Tail tip: hardened charcoal gray knuckle with cracked earth scar patterns.
